meta.title: MEVA Cloud — Multimodal Behavior Data for Physical AI
hero.title:
Physical AIaccelerated by multimodal behavior data
that connects embodiment and cognition.
hero.lead: In addition to motion captured with e-skin MEVA, MEVA Cloud integrates field-of-view video, external video, foot-contact probability, pressure, and body metadata as human behavior data for Physical AI learning.
peek.walk.title: Walking Dataset
peek.factory.title: Factory Reach Task
peek.pressure.title: Foot Pressure Motion
datasets.title: MEVA Omni Capsules
datasets.lead: Each Omni Capsule packages motion, vision, contact and context as reusable human behavior data for Physical AI.
dataset.walk.title: Walking
dataset.walk.desc: A pilot walking dataset planned around 30 subjects, including natural walking, fast walking, start-stop and turning. Includes age, sex, height and weight metadata.
dataset.factory.title: Factory Reach Task
dataset.factory.desc: Upper-body reaching and handling movements with posture load indicators for ergonomics and work analysis.
dataset.pressure.title: Foot Pressure Motion
dataset.pressure.desc: Synchronized lower-body motion and pressure distribution for contact-rich movement understanding.
download.walk.text: Send a time-limited download link for Walking Dataset.
download.factory.text: Send a time-limited download link for Factory Reach Task.
download.pressure.text: Send a time-limited download link for Foot Pressure Motion.
download.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and receive this dataset download link.
modalities.title: Multimodal Dataset
modalities.lead: Beyond motion, vision, contact and context. Multimodal behavior data gives Physical AI the ability to perceive.
modality.motion.title: Motion
modality.motion.desc: Root translation, joint rotations, joint positions, BVH/CSV and future SMPL-X style formats for movement learning.
modality.vision.title: Vision
modality.vision.desc: Third-person and future EgoVision previews to preserve visual context.
modality.pressure.title: Pressure
modality.pressure.desc: Foot, seat or environment pressure maps connected to human movement.
modality.robot.title: Robot-ready
modality.robot.desc: Task instructions, body metadata and downloadable packages for Physical AI pipelines.
footer.copy: © Xenoma Inc. / MEVA Cloud visual concept
peek.jog.title: Jogging Dataset
peek.awa.title: Awa Odori
dataset.jog.title: Jogging
dataset.jog.desc: Light running and jogging motions for studying faster human locomotion and body dynamics.
dataset.pirouette.title: Pirouette
dataset.pirouette.desc: Rotational balance and full-body coordination data captured from pirouette movements.
dataset.jazz.title: Jazz Dance
dataset.jazz.desc: Expressive whole-body motion with rhythm, transitions and dynamic upper-lower body coordination.
dataset.radio.title: Radio Calisthenics
dataset.radio.desc: A standard Japanese exercise routine with structured full-body movements, presented as a repeatable motion sequence.
dataset.awa.title: Awa Odori
dataset.awa.desc: Traditional Japanese festival dance data with rhythmic stepping and characteristic upper-body gestures.
dataset.sit.title: Sit-to-Stand
dataset.sit.desc: Placeholder dataset for daily transfer motions such as sitting, standing and balance recovery.
dataset.object.title: Object Picking
dataset.object.desc: Placeholder dataset for reaching, picking and handling objects in a simple physical task.
download.jog.text: Send a time-limited download link for Jogging Dataset.
download.pirouette.text: Send a time-limited download link for Pirouette Dataset.
download.jazz.text: Send a time-limited download link for Jazz Dance Dataset.

download.awa.text: Send a time-limited download link for Awa Odori Dataset.
download.sit.text: Send a time-limited download link for Sit-to-Stand Dataset.
download.object.text: Send a time-limited download link for Object Picking Dataset.
footer.tagline: MEVA Omni Capsules package motion, vision, contact and context as reusable human behavior data for Physical AI.
capsules.title: MEVA Omni Capsules
capsules.lead: Each Omni Capsule packages motion, vision, contact and context as reusable human behavior data for Physical AI.
